lessons.name: Unit 3: Healthy Living for Teens
lessons.description: Learn about healthy living with modal verbs in conditional sentences type 1.

sections.heading: 1. Từ vựng (Vocabulary)
sections.content:
Health: healthy, fit, strong, energetic, active, exercise, workout, gym, yoga, meditation, sleep, rest, relax

Food: balanced diet, nutrition, vitamin, protein, carbohydrate, fat, vegetable, fruit, junk food, fast food, soft drink

Problems: stress, pressure, anxiety, depression, tired, exhausted, overweight, obesity, disease, illness

Activities: play sports, go jogging, do exercise, eat healthy, drink water, get enough sleep, avoid stress, stay positive

sections.heading: 2. Luyện tập từ vựng
sections.content: Practice using vocabulary in context about healthy lifestyle, nutrition, exercise, and mental health.

sections.heading: 3. Ngữ pháp (Grammar)
sections.content:
Modal Verbs in Conditional Sentences Type 1 (Động từ khuyết thiếu trong câu điều kiện loại 1)

A. Câu điều kiện loại 1 cơ bản:

  • Cấu trúc: If + S + V (present simple), S + will + V (infinitive)
  • Ex: If you eat healthy food, you will be strong.

B. Với động từ khuyết thiếu (Modal verbs):

  • Cấu trúc: If + S + V (present simple), S + modal verb + V (infinitive)
  • Modal verbs: can, may, might, should, must, have to, ought to

1. Can (có thể):

  • Ex: If you exercise regularly, you can stay fit.
  • Diễn tả khả năng

2. May/Might (có thể, có lẽ):

  • Ex: If you don't sleep enough, you may/might feel tired.
  • Diễn tả khả năng xảy ra (không chắc chắn)

3. Should (nên):

  • Ex: If you feel stressed, you should relax.
  • Diễn tả lời khuyên

4. Must/Have to (phải):

  • Ex: If you are sick, you must/have to see a doctor.
  • Diễn tả sự cần thiết, bắt buộc

C. Đảo ngữ (Unless = If not):

  • Unless + S + V, S + modal + V
  • Ex: Unless you exercise, you can't stay fit.
  • = If you don't exercise, you can't stay fit.

sections.heading: 4-11. Các phần còn lại
sections.content: Getting Started, A Closer Look 1-2, Communication, Skills 1-2, Looking Back, Project

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Conditional Type 1 với Can
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • If + S + V (present), S + can + V (infinitive)
  • Diễn tả khả năng

examples.question: If you exercise regularly, you ______ (can / stay) fit.
examples.solution: If you exercise regularly, you can stay fit.

examples.question: If you eat healthy food, you ______ (can / be) strong.
examples.solution: If you eat healthy food, you can be strong.
examples.explanation: can + be = có thể khỏe mạnh

examples.question: If you drink enough water, you ______ (can / avoid) dehydration.
examples.solution: If you drink enough water, you can avoid dehydration.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 2: Conditional Type 1 với May/Might
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • If + S + V (present), S + may/might + V
  • Diễn tả khả năng không chắc chắn

examples.question: If you don't sleep enough, you ______ (may / feel) tired.
examples.solution: If you don't sleep enough, you may feel tired.
examples.explanation: may + feel = có thể cảm thấy

examples.question: If you eat junk food, you ______ (might / gain) weight.
examples.solution: If you eat junk food, you might gain weight.
examples.explanation: might + gain = có thể tăng cân

examples.question: If you don't exercise, you ______ (may / become) weak.
examples.solution: If you don't exercise, you may become weak.
examples.explanation: may + become = có thể trở nên

problemTypes.name: Dạng 3: Conditional Type 1 với Should/Must
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • If + S + V, S + should/must + V
  • should = lời khuyên; must = bắt buộc

examples.question: If you feel stressed, you ______ (should / relax).
examples.solution: If you feel stressed, you should relax.

examples.question: If you are sick, you ______ (must / see) a doctor.
examples.solution: If you are sick, you must see a doctor.

examples.question: If you want to be healthy, you ______ (should / eat) well.
examples.solution: If you want to be healthy, you should eat well.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 4: Unless (If not)
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Unless + S + V (khẳng định), S + modal + V
  • Unless = If not

examples.question: Unless you exercise, you ______ (can't / stay) fit.
examples.solution: Unless you exercise, you can't stay fit.
examples.explanation: Unless = If you don't; can't = không thể

examples.question: Unless you eat healthy, you ______ (may / get) sick.
examples.solution: Unless you eat healthy, you may get sick.
examples.explanation: Unless = If you don't; may get = có thể bị

examples.question: Unless you sleep enough, you ______ (should / rest) more.
examples.solution: Unless you sleep enough, you should rest more.
examples.explanation: Unless = If you don't; should rest = nên nghỉ

exercises.question: If you exercise regularly, you ______ stay fit.
If you don't sleep enough, you ______ feel tired.
If you feel stressed, you ______ relax.
If you are sick, you ______ see a doctor.
If you eat junk food, you ______ gain weight.
Unless you exercise, you ______ stay fit.
exercises.explanation: Unless = If not; can't = không thể

exercises.question: If you want to be healthy, you ______ eat well.
If you drink enough water, you ______ avoid dehydration.
If you don't exercise, you ______ become weak.
Unless you eat healthy, you ______ get sick.
exercises.explanation: Unless = If not; may = có thể

exercises.question: Which modal verbs can be used in conditional type 1? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Tất cả đều có thể dùng: can (khả năng), may (có thể), should (nên), must (phải)

exercises.question: Which sentences are correct? (Select all that apply)
options: If you exercise, you can stay fit.
If you don't sleep, you may feel tired.
If you are sick, you will must see a doctor.
Unless you eat healthy, you may get sick.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: can stay, may feel, Unless...may get. Sai: will must (không dùng 2 modal verbs)

exercises.question: Which express advice or recommendation? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: should và ought to = nên (lời khuyên). must = phải (bắt buộc); can = có thể (khả năng)

exercises.question: Fill in: If you exercise regularly, you ______ (can / stay) fit.
Fill in: If you feel stressed, you ______ (should / relax).
Fill in: Unless you exercise, you ______ (can't / stay) fit.
Rewrite: If you don't eat healthy, you may get sick. → Unless ______.
exercises.correct: Unless you eat healthy, you may get sick

exercises.question: Rearrange: exercise / If / you / regularly / , / can / you / stay / fit / .
exercises.sample_answer: If you exercise regularly, you can stay fit.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: If + S + V, S + can + V

exercises.question: Transform: You should relax if you feel stressed. → If ______.
exercises.sample_answer: If you feel stressed, you should relax.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: Đảo mệnh đề If lên trước

exercises.question: Transform: If you don't exercise, you can't stay fit. → Unless ______.
exercises.sample_answer: Unless you exercise, you can't stay fit.

exercises.question: Rearrange: stressed / If / feel / you / , / should / you / relax / . / sick / are / you / If / , / must / you / see / doctor / a / .
exercises.sample_answer: If you feel stressed, you should relax. If you are sick, you must see a doctor.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: If + S + V, S + should/must + V

exercises.question: Transform and combine: You exercise regularly. You can stay fit. + You don't sleep enough. You may feel tired. (Use conditional type 1 with modal verbs)
exercises.sample_answer: If you exercise regularly, you can stay fit. If you don't sleep enough, you may feel tired.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: Câu 1 dùng 'can' (khả năng), Câu 2 dùng 'may' (có thể)
